utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully specified: (1) property includes name, address, price, type, features, maintenance fees, and condition; (2) financing includes method, equity_used, remaining_equity, and notes; (3) legal_services includes provider, scope, and cost; (4) moving_services includes organizing_service, moving_company, storage_provider, detailed costs, and total_moving_cost; (5) setup_services includes utilities, estimated_setup_cost, and notes; (6) total_budget includes all the relevant cost breakdowns. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are fully covered.
